deliverables.description: Provisional corrosion coupon exposure ranking with normalized scores, weighted totals, row/value citations, and needs_review manufacturability flags.
Method note with min-max calculations, assumptions, exceptions, sensitivity notes, validation checks, and final decision table.

notes: Density was used as a mass proxy because coupon geometry or direct mass was not supplied in the packet.
Manufacturability was not invented; it remains needs_review.

output_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.
artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
